commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The blocker is a narrow code repair, but this external PR also needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof after the fix, so it should stay in human review rather than a repair marker lane.; Needs attention: The patch improves hidden reasoning stripping, but a live streaming path still has a mismatched grammar that can leave sensitive reasoning-delivery behavior unresolved.; Review finding: [P1] Mirror the... (sha=6147bc0529ec322b64dc618993fb1b6eb3f5e580)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `reasoning` and `antml:reasoning` handling to assistant-visible sanitization, embedded thinking-tag extraction, block-reply stripping, and focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +74, Tests +99. Total +173 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main routes OpenAI completions text through `reasoningTagTextPartitioner.push()`/`pushVisible()`, while that partitioner still recognizes `reasoning` with the broader `\b[^<>]*>` grammar. I did not run a live MiniMax/LiteLLM reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocker is a narrow code repair, but this external PR also needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof after the fix, so it should stay in human review rather than a repair marker lane.

target.title: fix(agents): strip reasoning tags from chat replies
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89473.

- Treat `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` as reasoning-control tags in assistant-visible final sanitization.
- Require an exact tag-name boundary for the newly recognized reasoning tags so visible XML-ish prose such as `<reasoning-step>` stays visible.
- Keep leading and trailing unclosed `<reasoning>` bodies hidden, while preserving the standalone literal prose mention `The <reasoning> tag ...`.
- Align embedded stream/block-reply scanners with the shared sanitizer grammar for attributes and self-closing reasoning tags.

## Root Cause

OpenAI-compatible providers can emit hidden reasoning inside `<reasoning>` blocks, but the final assistant text sanitizer and embedded chat delivery scanners only recognized the older think/thinking/thought tag variants. Adding `reasoning` also needs a strict boundary because `\b` would classify names like `<reasoning-step>` as hidden-control tags, and strict unclosed-tag recovery needs to distinguish hidden reasoning from visible prose that merely mentions the tag.

The embedded scanner also needs the same tag tail as the final sanitizer. Without that, `<reasoning hidden="1">secret</reasoning>Visible` is detected as suspicious by the message handler but not stripped by `THINKING_TAG_SCAN_RE`, so block-reply delivery can still expose hidden reasoning before final sanitization sees the completed message.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Assistant-visible final text and embedded chat block replies now strip hidden `<reasoning>` and `<antml:reasoning>` blocks through the same paths that already strip think/thinking tags. Attribute-bearing reasoning open tags are stripped in embedded block replies, self-closing reasoning tags do not hide following visible text, visible non-control tags such as `<reasoning-step>` remain visible, and the standalone literal prose mention `The <reasoning> tag ...` remains visible.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on this PR branch at `6147bc0529ec322b64dc618993fb1b6eb3f5e580`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran local `pnpm exec tsx --eval '...'` source probes importing `src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts`, `src/shared/text/assistant-visible-text.ts`, `src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts`, then ran focused Vitest coverage for the shared sanitizer, embedded extraction helper, embedded subscribe block-reply flow, and message handler recompute trigger.

Evidence after fix:

```json
{"input":"Visible prefix <reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"Visible prefix","sanitize":"Visible prefix"}
{"input":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","strip":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example.","sanitize":"The <reasoning> tag is deprecated in this example."}
{"input":"<reasoning> tag should be hidden","strip":"","sanitize":""}
```

```json
{"input":"<reasoning hidden=\"1\">secret</reasoning>Visible","matchedTags":["<reasoning hidden=\"1\">","</reasoning>"],"thinkingText":"secret","streamingThinkingText":"secret"}
{"input":"<antml:reasoning hidden=\"1\">secret</antml:reasoning>Visible","matchedTags":["<antml:reasoning hidden=\"1\">","</antml:reasoning>"],"thinkingText":"secret","streamingThinkingText":"secret"}
{"input":"<reasoning/>Visible","matchedTags":["<reasoning/>"],"thinkingText":"","streamingThinkingText":""}
{"input":"<antml:reasoning />Visible","matchedTags":["<antml:reasoning />"],"thinkingText":"","streamingThinkingText":""}
```

Focused subscriber/block-reply regressions now cover:

- `<reasoning hidden="1">Reasoning chunk that should not leak</reasoning>Final answer` -> block reply `Final answer`
- `<antml:reasoning hidden="1">Reasoning chunk that should not leak</antml:reasoning>Final answer` -> block reply `Final answer`
- `<reasoning/>Final answer` -> block reply `Final answer`
- `<antml:reasoning />Final answer` -> block reply `Final answer`

Observed result after fix: Closed reasoning blocks are removed from visible assistant text, literal standalone tag mentions survive final/non-stream extraction, leading and trailing unclosed reasoning text stay hidden, attribute-bearing reasoning tags are stripped from embedded block replies, self-closing reasoning tags do not swallow following visible text, and the embedded subscriber tag matrix covers `reasoning` and `antml:reasoning` block replies.

What was not tested: Full repository suite, broad changed checks beyond GitHub CI, and a live MiniMax/LiteLLM reproduction.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec tsx --eval '...'` direct source proofs above
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files / 209 tests passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.ts src/shared/text/reasoning-tags.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-utils.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.e2e-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.handlers.messages.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-agent-session.subscribeembeddedagentsession.test.ts` -> passed
- `git diff --check` -> passed
